summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Danish Kørselsrapport (Driving Report) application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Successfully tested driver management, mail parsing, tour management, and UI interactions.

design_issues.issue: HTML validation warning about nested button elements in driver tags
design_issues.details: Console warning: 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>' - delete button inside driver tag button

passed_tests: Mail parsing with Danish date format
